_comment: Example Claude Code MCP server configuration for the WFI Canon MCP server. Replace ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO with the location of your local clone of wfi-ai-connectors-public. Run 'npm install' and 'npm run build' first. Remove the _comment and _comment_* keys before use.
_comment_env_override: To test an unmerged canon index branch, add to env: "WFI_CANON_INDEX_URL": "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/welfare-footprint-institute/wfi-scientific-canon-public/docs/add-canon-index/canon_index.yaml"
_comment_dev_alternative: To run from TypeScript without building, set command to 'npx' and args to ["tsx", "ABSOLUTE_PATH_TO/wfi-ai-connectors-public/src/index.ts"].
